name: Interakt
description: WhatsApp Business API platform from India with shared inbox, automation, broadcast and Shopify integrations.

seo.title: Interakt — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: Interakt: WhatsApp Business API platform from India with shared inbox, automation, broadcast and Shopify integrations.

when_to_use: WhatsApp shared inbox for Indian e-commerce support
Automated WhatsApp campaigns with Shopify integration
Broadcast product updates to WhatsApp opt-in subscribers
Order confirmation and tracking via WhatsApp Business
Customer segmentation for targeted WhatsApp messaging

pros: Tight Shopify and Indian commerce integrations
Shared inbox plus automation in one plan
Affordable entry pricing for D2C brands
cons: Analytics shallow vs dedicated marketing tools
Support responsiveness inconsistent on lower tiers
India-first focus limits global compliance features
review.verdict: Pragmatic WhatsApp BSP for Indian Shopify brands — easy start, less depth as you scale.
review.best_for: Indian D2C Shopify brands wanting WhatsApp inbox plus broadcasts
review.not_for: Global enterprises needing advanced analytics and multi-region compliance
